title: Rabbits Don't Take Fall Damage
description: Rabbits will no longer harm themselves when they run off cliffs to escape the player.
body:
# Description
Rabbits will no longer harm themselves when they run off cliffs to escape the player. This is a fix for the [MC-77732 bug, "Rabbits willingly take fall damage from 3 high blocks"](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-77732).

# Optional Advancment Guides
To enable a list with guides for my datapacks, use `/advancement grant <targets> from dragon3025:root`.
